about.label: All in One Company
about.content: Bringing together modern <digitalTools>digital tools</digitalTools> for businesses in one place. From digital business cards and QR-powered menus to interactive product showcases — each platform is designed to help businesses present themselves more effectively online. Every service operates independently with its own <features>features and pricing</features> <icon></icon> while making it easier to explore and access the complete Wee product lineup.

products.label: Services
products.title: Everything You Need To Connect Digitally
products.description: From first interaction to daily operations, WeeNetwork keeps your digital touchpoints clear.

weeCard.subtitle: Digital Business Card
weeCard.description: Share your contact details instantly with a modern digital business card experience. Create multiple cards, collect leads and connect through QR and NFC technology.

weeMenu.subtitle: QR Menu Platform
weeMenu.description: Replace printed menus with a fast and modern digital menu experience. Update products, prices and categories anytime without reprinting costs.

weeCatalog.subtitle: Digital Product Catalog
weeCatalog.description: Create beautiful digital catalogs and showcase your products online. Currently in development and coming soon to the WeeNetwork ecosystem.

items.question: Do I need to install an app to use WeeCard or WeeMenu?
items.answer: No. WeeCard profiles and WeeMenu pages open in the browser after a QR or NFC interaction.

items.question: Can I update my information after sharing my QR code?
items.answer: Yes. You can keep the same QR destination and update the information shown to visitors.

items.question: Can I use my own branding and custom design?
items.answer: Each product can be shaped with content, colors and presentation choices that support your brand.

items.question: Is WeeMenu suitable for cafes, restaurants and hotels?
items.answer: Yes. WeeMenu is built for food and hospitality businesses that need an easy mobile menu flow.

items.question: Can I collect customer leads with WeeCard?
items.answer: WeeCard can support contact-focused journeys that make it easier for visitors to reach your business.

items.question: When will WeeCatalog be available?
items.answer: WeeCatalog is presented as an upcoming product in this first website release.

items.question: Which product is right for my business?
items.answer: Choose WeeCard for identity sharing, WeeMenu for scan-ready menus and WeeCatalog for product showcases.

hero.label: QR Menu Platform
hero.title: Create Beautiful Digital Menus in Minutes
hero.description: Build stunning QR-based restaurant menus with modern themes, custom colors, and multi-language support. Export to PDF, manage products easily, and share instantly.

howItWorks.label: How It Works
howItWorks.title: Create Your Digital Menu in 4 Simple Steps
howItWorks.description: From setup to sharing, WeeMenu makes it easy to transform your restaurant menu into a modern digital experience.
howItWorks.step1Description: Add your products, organize categories, and set prices with our intuitive dashboard.
howItWorks.step2Description: Choose from modern themes, customize colors and fonts to match your brand.
howItWorks.step3Description: Export to PDF or generate QR codes for instant sharing with customers.
howItWorks.step4Description: Access your dashboard from any device - phone, tablet, or computer.

features.label: Features
features.title: Powerful Tools for Your Restaurant
features.description: Everything you need to create, customize, and manage your digital menu.
features.feature1Description: Choose from multiple stylish templates and switch with one click.
features.feature2Description: Personalize your menu with custom fonts and color schemes.
features.feature3Description: Export your entire menu to PDF with a single click for printing.
features.feature4Description: Add multiple languages to serve diverse customers.
features.feature5Description: Manage your menu from phone, tablet, or computer seamlessly.
features.feature6Description: Share WiFi password with customers via QR code in settings.
features.feature7Description: Highlight special items to attract customer attention.
features.feature8Description: Display your restaurant's operating hours on the menu.

dashboardAccess.label: Dashboard Access
dashboardAccess.title: Manage Your Menu from Anywhere
dashboardAccess.description: Access your dashboard from any device - phone, tablet, or computer. No app download required, everything works in your browser.

sampleMenus.label: Live Showcase
sampleMenus.title: Browse Menus Already Published with WeeMenu
sampleMenus.description: Review recently published, content-rich menus and evaluate the flow in context. Open any card directly or scan the QR code to test the mobile experience.

faq.label: FAQ
faq.title: Frequently asked questions
faq.description: Practical answers about menus, products, templates, settings and QR sharing — the details we do not cover elsewhere on this page.

items.question: Can I manage more than one menu from a single account?
items.answer: Yes. Your dashboard lets you create, switch between and manage multiple menus for different locations or brands.

items.question: Can I duplicate an existing menu when creating a new one?
items.answer: Yes. When creating a menu you can start from scratch or copy an existing menu to reuse categories, products and settings.

items.question: Do menu updates go live immediately for guests?
items.answer: Yes. Price, product and design changes are reflected on the live menu without waiting for a new print run.

items.question: Can a product have multiple sizes or price options?
items.answer: Yes. You can enable price options on a product to offer variants such as small, medium or large with separate prices.

items.question: Can I organize items into categories?
items.answer: Yes. Products are grouped into categories so guests can browse your menu in a clear, structured order.

items.question: Can I highlight specific dishes on the menu?
items.answer: Yes. Mark products as featured to display them in a dedicated highlighted section on supported templates.

items.question: Can I change the template after my menu is already live?
items.answer: Yes. Open the design panel, pick another template and apply it with one click whenever you want a new look.

items.question: Will switching templates delete my products or categories?
items.answer: No. Your menu content and settings stay intact — only the layout, colors and presentation change.

items.question: Can I customize colors and fonts for my menu?
items.answer: Yes. Beyond choosing a template, you can adjust colors, fonts and background styling to match your brand.

items.question: Can I publish the same menu in multiple languages?
items.answer: Yes. Add languages in menu settings and provide translated names and descriptions for categories and products.

items.question: Can I show working hours and contact details on the menu?
items.answer: Yes. Configure business information, opening hours, address and social links from the settings panel.

items.question: Can guests connect to WiFi directly from the menu?
items.answer: Yes. Add your WiFi details in settings and guests can scan a WiFi QR code from the live menu page.

items.question: Do I need a new QR code when I update prices or products?
items.answer: No. The same QR code and menu link always open your latest published content.

items.question: Can I download the menu QR code for print materials?
items.answer: Yes. From the dashboard you can view your menu QR code and download it as a PNG file for tables, posters or packaging.

items.question: Do guests need to install an app to view the menu?
items.answer: No. Scanning the QR code opens your menu directly in the mobile browser — no app download required.
